faq.heading: Have Questions?
faq.subheading: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.

items.q: How do I place an order on SmartCart?
items.a: Browse our catalogue, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout. We accept all major cards, UPI, and buy-now-pay-later options. Orders are confirmed instantly via email.

items.q: Can I modify or cancel my order after placing it?
items.a: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 1 hour of placement. After dispatch, you can initiate a return once delivered. Contact support for help.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, UPI, net banking, and EMI options through leading providers. All transactions are SSL-secured.

items.q: How do I initiate a return?
items.a: Log into your account, navigate to Orders, and select 'Return Item'. Our team will arrange a free pickup within 48 hours and process your refund in 3–5 business days.

items.q: How can I track my order?
items.a: You'll receive a tracking link via email and SMS once your order is dispatched. You can also track in real-time from your SmartCart account dashboard.

items.q: Do you offer exchanges for products?
items.a: Yes! Exchanges are available within 30 days of purchase for unused items in original packaging. We'll ship the replacement once we receive the returned item.
